# Kithos

> Commercial reasoning for B2B teams selling into complex buying environments.

## What Kithos is

Kithos is a commercial reasoning system for B2B teams selling into complex buying environments. It researches activity and signals from across the stack and remembers what each outcome teaches the team.

## Who Kithos is for

B2B teams selling into complex buying environments — where the right account is not obvious, the buyer is not always the user, and the problem has to be understood before the product can be sold. Technical products, regulated markets, and emerging categories.

## How it works

1. **Research.** Kithos gathers activity, assumptions, data, and signals from connected tools, external sources, and what your team shares — and builds a working understanding of your market, accounts, buyers, and past outcomes.
2. **Remember.** Kithos commits replies, silence, objections, meetings, wins, and losses into memory so each outcome shapes the next account, message, follow-up, and deal decision.

## How Kithos relates to existing tools

A CRM records activity. Conversation intelligence captures what happened on calls. Forecasting tools predict where pipeline will land. Kithos researches the full picture, remembers what outcomes teach the team, and answers what this seller should do next.

## Status

Kithos is in early access. Teams apply through the website.
